swiftblade_emblem.name: Swiftblade Emblem
swiftblade_emblem.description: +15% speed. +10% damage when combat ends in 3 rounds or fewer.

aegis_of_perfection.name: Aegis of Perfection
aegis_of_perfection.description: +20% dodge chance. Barrier regenerates 5% max HP per turn.

unity_band.name: Unity Band
unity_band.description: +10% all stats when all 4 party members are alive.

midas_crown.name: Midas Crown
midas_crown.description: +25% gold gain from all sources. Enemies drop 1-3 gold on each hit received.

arbiters_seal.name: Arbiter's Seal
arbiters_seal.description: +15% all stats. Cosmetic glow on party.
